candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue aggregate; matches REVT definition and clearly used as total sales.

candidates.row_label: Ground leases/Rental Expenses - Cost of Sales
candidates.why: Cost item, not revenue; only listed as candidate due to heuristic, not appropriate for REVT.
Operating expense within SG&A, not a revenue line.
Balance sheet asset, not an income statement revenue line.
Deferred revenue liability; not the revenue flow itself.

candidates.row_label: Contract Liabilities - Short-Term - Advance Consideration & Progress Billings in Excess of Unbilled Revenue
candidates.why: Deferred revenue/contract liability; not a P&L revenue figure.
Deferred revenue liability; not the realized revenue line.

candidates.row_label: Cost of materials and traffic charges
candidates.why: Main combined line for direct costs of materials and traffic; best representation of cost of sales/COGS.
Component of COGS related to traffic; useful fallback if combined line unavailable for some years.
Component of COGS related to materials; another reasonable fallback if the main combined line is missing.

candidates.row_label: Ground leases/Rental Expenses - Cost of Sales
candidates.why: Specific COGS-related component (rental in cost of sales); can serve as lower-priority fallback if other lines missing.

candidates.row_label: Costs of materials and traffic charge - Balancing value
candidates.why: Explicitly a balancing value, not an economic cost; should be excluded per instructions to avoid subtotals/balancing items.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of materials and traffic charges
Ground leases/Rental Expenses - Cost of Sales

variables.notes: Primary COGS is the combined 'Cost of materials and traffic charges'; others are ordered as fallbacks per revenue rule for single-line COGS treatment.

candidates.why: Classic SG&A personnel/overhead cost; clearly operating overhead not tied directly to COGS.
Broad operating expense bucket that typically captures SG&A-like overhead; separate from COGS and D&A.
This is income, not expense; should not be included in SG&A components per instructions.
Share-based compensation is an SG&A-type overhead cost and explicitly allowed in SG&A components.
Mixed bucket but labeled operating income/expenses; usable as an additional SG&A-type overhead component.
Balance sheet asset, not an expense line; should not be used for SG&A expense mapping.
Accumulated depreciation on assets, not a current-period SG&A expense line item for our purposes.
Net asset balance, not an expense flow.
Accumulated depreciation, not the SG&A expense component row we want.

variables.notes: Multiple SG&A component rows are selected as allowed: personnel, other operating expenses, share-based payments, and a mixed operating income/expenses bucket. Explicit totals/subtotals are avoided.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; directly matches XRD definition.
Main aggregate interest expense line with populated values; best primary choice for interest expense.
Label suggests total gross interest, but appears unpopulated in preview; keep as lower-priority fallback.
Capitalised interest, not expense recognized in P&L; generally excluded from XINT but retained as very low-priority fallback if needed.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Component of interest expense related to lease liabilities; useful fallback if main line missing in some years.
Component of interest expense excluding leases; together with lease interest it composes total interest; good fallback.
Represents minority interest in profit, not interest expense; should not be used for XINT.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity/profit allocation, not interest expense.
Generic interest expense label; appears as supplemental but semantically correct as interest expense; good secondary fallback.
Capitalized interest (alt spelling); similar to 'Interest Capitalised' and not P&L expense; very low-priority fallback only.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest; may be populated in some years; lower-priority fallback.
Balance sheet liability, not an interest expense flow.
Liability classification, not an interest expense.
Liability category; not relevant for interest expense value.
Long-term debt balance, not expense.
Liability category; not an expense line.
Liability category; not an expense line.
Liability category; not an expense line.
Equity component; unrelated to interest expense.
Equity component; unrelated to interest expense.
Generic label but appears not populated/defined here; if it existed as a P&L item it could represent interest, but context is unclear.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list so downstream logic can pick the first non-missing interest expense figure per year, starting from the main aggregate 'Interest Expenses' line.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit, not a balance sheet equity stock; not ideal for BE.
P&L gain/loss, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of Telenor ASA
candidates.why: Explicit common shareholders’ equity on the balance sheet; best match for book equity (BE).
Component category, but appears empty/undefined; less precise than full equity total.
Balance sheet row equal to equity attributable to equity holders (based on numbers); acceptable fallback.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; broader than common equity, but still a usable fallback if needed.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of Telenor ASA

variables.notes: Primary choice is common equity attributable to equity holders; consolidated totals are provided as ordered fallbacks.

candidates.why: Represents net income attributable to non-controlling interests; however MIB for PROF is typically a balance sheet equity item, so this is secondary.
Duplicate of 'Non-controlling interests' label; P&L attribution, not preferred if equity balance is available.
Balance sheet minority interest equity; best match for MIB definition.
Alternate label for the same balance sheet minority interest; good fallback.

variables.notes: Uses balance sheet minority interest as primary source for MIB, with alternative label as fallback.
